articles.source: Tennessee Department of Economic & Community Development
articles.title: Starbucks Selects Tennessee for Southeast Corporate Office - News
articles.summary: Starbucks announced plans to establish a corporate operations office in Davidson County, Tennessee, later this year, expanding its North American presence. This move is intended to support the company's growth in the Southeast U.S. and leverage Nashville's talented workforce. Governor Bill Lee and Starbucks officials highlighted Tennessee's business-friendly environment and Nashville's appeal for high-quality corporate growth.
articles.text_to_analyze: Starbucks Selects Tennessee for Southeast Corporate Office - News. articles.title: Pumpkin Spice Latte 2025: Is Starbucks’ Iconic Drink Still Worth the Hype?
articles.summary: This article examines the 2025 return of Starbucks' Pumpkin Spice Latte (PSL), analyzing its tweaked recipe, pricing, and overall value. It explores the cultural phenomenon of the PSL, consumer sentiment regarding sweetness and cost, and its standing against competitors, concluding that its appeal lies more in seasonal ritual and emotional connection than just being a coffee. The piece advises customers on customization for better value and flavor.

articles.title: Starbucks expands corporate offices to Nashville
articles.summary: Starbucks plans to open a corporate office in Nashville, establishing a strategic presence in the Southeast. The company intends to offer roles to dozens of its Seattle employees for this new location. This expansion comes as Starbucks continues to grow, with plans for hundreds of new stores in 2026.
